summary: Current Chief Minister of Kerala is Pinarayi Vijayan.
Python is an interpreted, high-level programming language known for its ease of use.
Java is a compiled, high-level programming language designed for platform independence.

cards.title: Chief Minister of Kerala
cards.question: Who is the current Chief Minister of Kerala?

cards.title: Characteristics of Python
cards.question: What are key features of Python?
cards.answer: Dynamic typing, readable syntax, and extensive libraries.

cards.title: Characteristics of Java
cards.question: What makes Java platform-independent?
cards.answer: It utilizes the Java Virtual Machine (JVM) to run on any device.
